start: sleep 3 && if [ -n "$GITHUB_ACTIONS_PAT" ]; then printf '%s' "$GITHUB_ACTIONS_PAT" | gh auth login --with-token 2>/dev/null || true; fi && if [ -n "$GMAIL_OAUTH_JSON" ] && [ -n "$GMAIL_TOKEN_JSON" ]; then mkdir -p credentials && printf '%s' "$GMAIL_OAUTH_JSON" > credentials/gmail-oauth.json && printf '%s' "$GMAIL_TOKEN_JSON" > credentials/gmail-token.json; fi
